modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to provide documentation for FAFSA independence status.

full_description_text:  
I got an email about my FAFSA. They say I need to show proof of being independent. Also, I need to correct my FAFSA. I don’t understand what to do next.
short_description: Need to provide documentation for FAFSA independence status.
description: I got an email about my FAFSA. They say I need to show proof of being independent. Also, I need to correct my FAFSA. I don’t understand what to do next.
